Name: Stream Dock API Request
Description: Send HTTP/API requests directly from a Stream Dock button and display the response.
Author: local

Actions.Name: API Request
Actions.Tooltip: Send one configured HTTP/API request when pressed.

Actions.Name: API Poll
Actions.Tooltip: Poll a configured HTTP/API request while the action is visible.

Actions.Name: Diagnostics
Actions.Tooltip: Show the last API request status, duration, and error.
